name: Stage 1
description: Conservative tune + EGR off. ~+15-18% torque, drivability-friendly. Lifts injection, rail pressure and torque limiter at higher RPM/load only. Compatible with stock turbo and stock injectors. EGR is software-disabled by saturating the phase-of-injection map to its own factory ceiling.

edits.comment: +18% main fueling at high RPM x high load (rows 7..15 x cols 11..15). Mirrors the real Stage1 reference.
+11% rail pressure at mid-high RPM x high load. Capped to keep within injector spray-in window.
+7% transient fueling at high load - improves throttle response.
+5% boost target at mid RPM x mid-high load. Conservative to avoid overspeeding the stock turbo.
+13% torque limit ceiling at mid-to-high RPM (rows 4..15), capped at 9000.

EGR off: setting every phase-of-injection cell to the map's own factory maximum disengages EGR closed-loop control. The ECU sees a flat reference and stops actuating the EGR valve - software-only EGR delete with no hardware blanking plate required.
